results.title: Onboarding snippets follow request origin
results.content: Changed admin onboarding and connection-test template generation so HTTP routes derive the public base URL from request.base_url and pass it into the admin use case. This removes hardcoded localhost values from dashboard snippets and makes deployed domains show correctly, while keeping localhost as a fallback for pure use-case or unit-test calls without request context.

results.title: Repository-first graph explorer and repo CRUD
results.content: Added admin repository detail/update/delete plus graph-map payloads so the dashboard can render a full repo graph by default. Backend files: src/minder/application/admin/dto.py, src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py, src/minder/presentation/http/admin/api.py, src/minder/store/interfaces.py, src/minder/store/graph.py, src/minder/tools/graph.py, tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py. Frontend files: src/dashboard/src/lib/api/admin.ts, src/dashboard/src/components/RepositoryGraphExplorerShell.astro, src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts. Validation: pytest integration, ruff, mypy, bun check.

results.title: Add shared /health route for HTTP and SSE app
results.content: Added GET /health to shared admin HTTP routes so both build_http_app and the SSE transport extra_routes respond to standard health probes. Added route-registration and integration coverage after a 404 surfaced on localhost health checks.

results.title: Bug: Docker dashboard build not found with Astro dist client layout
results.content: Root cause: the admin dashboard static handler only looked for HTML under dashboard.static_dir root, but Astro with the Node adapter writes static pages under dist/client. In Docker the image copied /dashboard/dist to /app/dashboard-dist, so /dashboard/login and related routes returned Dashboard build not found even though the bundle existed. Fix: add a resolver in src/minder/presentation/http/admin/dashboard.py that prefers static_dir/client when index.html exists there, while preserving the legacy flat dist layout. Added regression coverage in tests/integration/test_phase4_3_console_gate.py for the dist/client bundle layout.

results.title: Admin route split and architecture docs refresh
results.content: Split admin HTTP presentation into context/api/dashboard modules, removed legacy Python-rendered dashboard handlers, shifted tests to Astro plus JSON admin APIs, and expanded README/operator guides with whole-system architecture diagrams and route responsibilities. routes.py remains only as a composition boundary in the presentation layer.
